headlines.title: Cruise ship at center of suspected deadly hantavirus outbreak refused permission to dock
headlines.description: The cruise ship at the center of a deadly outbreak of hantavirus has been refused permission to dock, with 149 people still on board — two of them seriously ill

headlines.title: Graphic: Track U.S., state and county gas prices
headlines.description: Are gas prices declining? NBC News is tracking national, state and county prices at the pump.

headlines.title: How a weaker dollar is quietly making life more expensive
headlines.description: A hidden force is quietly pushing up costs for everything from your summer vacation to your weekly grocery bills: a weaker U.S. dollar

headlines.title: Thousand Left in Limbo After Spirit Airlines Abruptly Shuts Down
headlines.description: After Spirit Airlines shut down and cancelled all flights, customers across the country have been left stranded and confused. Travelers will now have to cover the cost of their trip on alternate airlines. NBC’s Tom Costello reports and Brian Cheung joins TODAY to break down what someone with a cancelled Spirit ticket should do.

headlines.title: Duffy details how other airlines will assist Spirit customers after flights canceled
headlines.description: Transportation Secretary Sean Duffy gave an update after Spirit Airlines announced it will shut down and how other airlines are planning to assist Spirit customers with canceled flights.

headlines.title: How Influencer Impersonation Scams Are Targeting Users Online
headlines.description: A new social commerce scam involves fraudsters impersonating social media influencers for financial gain. Reporting for Saturday TODAY, NBC’s Vicky Nguyen breaks down the details of the scam and how to protect yourself.

headlines.title: Gas Prices Continue to Rise as Talks With Iran Remain Stalled
headlines.description: As the war with Iran continues to impact the critical Strait of Hormuz, gas prices are continuing to rise across the United States with talks to reopen the critical waterway stalled. It comes as President Donald Trump is vowing that gas prices will go down, but only once the war is over and there’s no clear timeline for that. NBC’s Allie Canal reports for Saturday TODAY.

headlines.title: After Spirit collapse strands travelers, here's what to know about refunds and rebooking
headlines.description: FORT LAUDERDALE, Fla. — Passengers arriving at Fort Lauderdale-Hollywood International Airport this weekend were still being dropped off for flights that no longer existed — learning only at curbside that Spirit Airlines had shut down overnight.“I just found out,” Ricardo Tejeda said Saturday after stepping off a shuttle

headlines.title: Spirit Airlines is closing down. Thousands of employees and travelers are impacted.
headlines.description: Spirit Airlines will shut down and liquidate its holdings. With 17,000 employees, it was unable to bear the soaring cost of jet fuel during the Iran war.

headlines.title: Spirit Airlines could shut down as soon as tomorrow, source says
headlines.description: Spirit Airlines could shut down as soon as tomorrow, a source says, as talks with the Trump administration about a bailout fail to reach a deal

headlines.title: Gas prices hit $4.39 per gallon in biggest one-day jump since Iran ceasefire announced
headlines.description: The national average gas price rose to $4.39 per gallon, in its biggest one-day jump since a ceasefire with Iran was announced on April 7.

headlines.title: Build-A-Bear recalls roughly 36,000 Heart-Warming Hugs Bears
headlines.description: Roughly 36,000 Heartwarming Hugs Bears, a stuffed animal manufactured by Build-A-Bear, are being recalled due to a zipper detaching from the bear’s pouch
